nasb.text: Now David was clothed with a robe of fine linen with all the Levites who were carrying the ark, and the singers and Chenaniah the leader of the singing with the singers. David also wore an ephod of linen.

esv.text: David was clothed with a robe of fine linen, as also were all the Levites who were carrying the ark, and the singers and Chenaniah the leader of the music of the singers. And David wore a linen ephod.

cnv.text: 大衛和所有抬約櫃的利未人，以及歌唱的人和歌唱的人的領袖基拿尼雅，都穿上細麻布的外袍；大衛另外穿上細麻布的以弗得。

ccb.text: 大卫和抬约柜的利未人、歌乐手及其领班基拿尼雅都穿上细麻衣，大卫还穿上细麻布的以弗得。
